description: CareFi acquires the initial independent USDiMED float at a discount to medical-CPI fair value before a broad secondary market forms.
CareFi allocates part of its discounted float plus USDC to seed the first external MEDUSDi / USDC reference market.
Specialist traders begin trading the basis between MEDUSDi spot, medical-CPI fair value, and healthcare-inflation expectations.
Additional MEDUSDi supply emerges as USDi holders create medical slices; the market deepens while CareFi remains the anchor LP/operator.
The MEDUSDi / USDC pool becomes evidence for broader CareFi infrastructure: reference markets, risk surfaces, listed products, and structured exposure.
